matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The Brazilian Forest Service LPF species page explicitly identifies Lueheopsis duckeana and captions this image Corte radial.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at original resolution. The image is entirely a clean exposed longitudinal wood surface with visible grain; it contains no tree, leaves, bark exterior, furniture, illustration, or microscopic section.
matchedCandidate.creator: Serviço Florestal Brasileiro, Laboratório de Produtos Florestais (LPF/SFB)
